"""SessionsCostSummary separates cash, subscription-equivalent, and local session costs"""
type SessionsCostSummary {

  cashUsd: Float!
  """Dollar-equivalent token value consumed under subscription harnesses"""
  subscriptionEquivUsd: Float!
  """Count of sessions served locally"""
  localSessionCount: Int!

  localEstimatedUsd: Float
}

# Personas

"""Persona represents an AI persona definition from the library"""
type Persona implements Node {
  """Unique persona identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Persona name (e.g. "strict-code-reviewer")"""
  name: String!
  """Roles this persona fulfills (e.g. ["code-reviewer"])"""
  roles: [String!]!
  """Short description of the persona's behaviour"""
  description: String!
  """Freeform tags for discovery and filtering"""
  tags: [String!]!
  """Full persona prompt/instruction text"""
  content: String!
  """Markdown body for frontend detail views"""
  body: String!
  """Persona source package or plugin"""
  source: String!
  """Known project bindings for this persona"""
  bindings: [PersonaBinding!]!
  """Filesystem path to the persona definition file"""
  filePath: String
  """Last modification time of the persona file"""
  modTime: DateTime
}

"""PersonaBinding records one role binding for a persona"""
type PersonaBinding {
  """Project identifier containing the binding"""
  projectId: String!
  """Role name bound to the persona"""
  role: String!
  """Persona name assigned to the role"""
  persona: String!
}

"""PersonaEdge is one edge in a PersonaConnection"""
type PersonaEdge {
  """The persona at this position"""
  node: Persona!
  """Opaque cursor for pagination"""
  cursor: String!
}

"""PersonaConnection is a Relay cursor connection of personas"""
type PersonaConnection {
  """Ordered list of persona edges"""
  edges: [PersonaEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of personas matching the filter"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

# Executions

"""ExecutionDefinition describes a repeatable execution (check, benchmark, etc.)"""

  id: ID!
  """IDs of artifacts this definition produces or consumes"""

  result: ResultSpec

  evaluation: Evaluation

  active: Boolean!
  """Whether the definition must pass for merge"""
  required: Boolean
  """Whether this definition was discovered from the docgraph"""
  graphSource: Boolean
  """When the definition was created"""
  createdAt: DateTime!
}
